meta.title: Service Area
meta.description: Ryan Garage Door provides mobile garage door repair and installation across Huntley, IL and 18+ nearby communities within a 50-mile radius.

header.title: Where We Serve
header.subtitle: Based in Huntley, our mobile team covers {count} communities across the NW Chicago suburbs — roughly from Rockford in the northwest to Orland Park in the southeast, spanning McHenry, Kane, Lake, DuPage, Cook, Will, DeKalb, Kendall and Winnebago counties.

note.pre: Don’t see your town? We travel up to {radius} miles from Huntley — including parts of Elgin, Wheaton and greater Chicagoland.
